input.background: Heights of 10-year-old male children follow a Normal distribution with μ=138 centimeters and σ=7 centimeters.
input.question: Use the 68-95-99.7 rule to determine the middle 68% of values.

output.answer: According to the 68 part of the 68-95-99.7 rule, 68% of values will fall in the range 131 to 145.
